channel.title: Yes, You Can Dance!
channel.description: Special Needs, Senior & MS Dancing NonProfit | Jupiter, FL

item.title: Adaptive Dance Series 2022 is set for June 3-5!
item.dc:creator: Becky
item.content:encoded: Dima and Andrea Kuzmenko will be returning to teach Yes, You Can Merengue! and Yes, You Can Disco!.   Attack Theater and ComMotion will also be teaching workshops.  On Sunday, learn about the work done by  Joey's P.A.W.S.  We had so much fun last year.  Join for 1 workshop or all the workshops.  It is FREE.  It will be FUN.  For more information, visit the Attack Theater website.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The file was compressed from 224.49 KB to 212.94 KB saving 5.14 percent using WP-Optimize

item.title: Photos from the Pittsburg Reunion
item.dc:creator: YYAdmin

item.title: Happy New Year : YYCD Newsletter
item.dc:creator: YYAdmin
item.content:encoded:
View our New Year's Newsletter

Subscribe to the Newsletter here!

Read an excerpt:

Happy New Year!!

As we turn the page to a new year, I am grateful for the support and participation we enjoyed I 2022.  I am also excited for the opportunities that await us in 2023. 

In 2022, we were invited to participate in the 2nd Adaptive Dance Workshop hosted by Attack Theater.  We also hosted a Special Needs Ballroom Reunion Party in Pittsburgh.  In Florida, our curriculum is being taught in 2 Palm Beach County High Schools.  In addition, Dmitriy and Andrea Kuzmenko (Certified Instructors for Special Needs Ballroom) have opened their studio in Jupiter, Florida. 

I would be remiss, if I didn’t acknowledge the ongoing support of the HOPE Committee at Mitsubishi Electric. They have been providing financial support since 2015.  Their support makes it possible for us to continue to “transform lives through the power of dance.”  All of us at Yes, You Can Dance! are truly grateful.

To everyone who is a part of the Yes, You Can Dance! family, I wish you all a Happy and Healthy New Year. 

Becky Stern, President & Founder,

Yes, You Can Dance!

Read the whole thing

item.title: NEW! Special Needs Ballroom In Palm Beach County, Florida
item.dc:creator: Becky
item.content:encoded: In Motion Ballroom is launching a new session in January 2025. Space is limited.

item.title: testing
item.dc:creator: Sample
item.content:encoded:
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing elit litora tempus, semper est venenatis maecenas odio ligula aenean feugiat.

Porttitor vel pharetra nunc duis dictumst imperdiet sociosqu quis cum ultricies, rutrum pulvinar risus nulla vestibulum enim vulputate congue. Maecenas libero cras tellus risus in elementum dictum ad nullam morbi dapibus a, diam turpis etiam luctus hac sodales per ante blandit commodo conubia id, nisl congue tristique mollis odio nulla et tincidunt pulvinar gravida lobortis. Hac habitasse bibendum eget interdum orci posuere magnis, dignissim ultricies gravida litora curae cras torquent nec, magna class malesuada pretium primis porttitor. Lectus gravida phasellus a lacinia suspendisse scelerisque at fermentum dictum dis, nascetur per sollicitudin congue tristique laoreet justo penatibus conubia taciti orci, cras ut ad nec urna nibh tellus sociosqu id. Massa congue auctor arcu curae dui quisque et ac tincidunt nullam, fermentum nibh cursus taciti ante tortor bibendum ridiculus netus parturient litora, convallis himenaeos rutrum montes aenean fusce vestibulum magnis laoreet.

Nisi donec imperdiet egestas sollicitudin sodales ut tempus pretium magna quam enim quisque aliquet sociis parturient, sapien ridiculus nascetur auctor facilisis id dapibus hac viverra cras inceptos gravida ornare. Convallis magna fames maecenas praesent nibh pretium id facilisis curae, sociosqu sem facilisi venenatis vivamus quis diam tellus.
